title: LateGame+
description: A Minecraft Mod that adds more features to the game, once you've started to get bored.
body: This mod adds loads of extra dimensions to the game, and a ton of other features. So far, these dimensions are accessible by using late game resources, such as Ancient Debris, to make portals to other dimensions rich of ores. The Portals are ingited using their respected igniter. The Diamond Portal is made with 10 Diamond Blocks. The Emerald Portal is made with 10 Compact Emerald Blocks, each crafted with 9 Emerald Blocks. The Ore Portal is made with 10 Ancient Debris, and contains redstone, copper, iron, and coal.
